description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI: TCMalloc test that runs on push to master and main branches, on pull request open and synchronize, and on merge group checks requested. The workflow should also be dispatchable with an optional debug input. It uses a reusable workflow to find changed files and then tests with TCMalloc if changes are found or if the workflow is dispatched. The test job runs on ubuntu-24.04 with a 30-minute timeout and sets up Bazel and Python with caching.
